<includeonly>{{{number}}} Response{{#if:{{{date|}}}| ({{{date}}})}}{{#if:{{{note|}}}| — {{{note}}}}}</includeonly><noinclude>
== Usage ==
<code><nowiki>{{Cite rfi|number=RFI-042|date=2026-01-22|note=S-305 Detail 7 governs for wall penetration rebar}}</nowiki></code>

Renders as: RFI-042 Response (2026-01-22) — S-305 Detail 7 governs for wall penetration rebar

=== Parameters ===
* '''number''' (required): RFI number
* '''date''' (required): Response date
* '''note''' (optional): Brief description of what the response established

[[Category:Citation templates]]
</noinclude>
